user.title: Statistics Migration
user.description: INFO: In Phase 1, this integration only migrates the internal Home Assistant SQL data tables. Data in external databases (such as InfluxDB) remain untouched.

data.delete_old: Delete old entity completely from the database after successful migration.

error.db_error: Database error occurred during migration. Rollback executed.
error.same_entity: Old and new entity must not be identical.
error.no_statistics: The selected old entity does not have long-term statistics.
